Package recoder.service

Interface CrossReferenceSourceInfo

All Superinterfaces:
ProgramModelInfo, Service, SourceInfo
All Known Implementing Classes:
DefaultCrossReferenceSourceInfo, KeYCrossReferenceSourceInfo, SchemaCrossReferenceSourceInfo
public interface CrossReferenceSourceInfo extends SourceInfo
Source information service supporting cross reference information.

    Description
    List<ConstructorReference>
    getReferences(Constructor m)
    Returns the list of references to a given constructor.

    Returns the list of references to a given field.

    Returns the list of references to a given method (or constructor).

    Returns the list of references to a given package.

    Returns the list of references to a given type.

  • Method Details

    • getReferences

      List<MemberReference> getReferences(Method m)
      Returns the list of references to a given method (or constructor). The references stem from all known compilation units.
      Parameters:
      m - a method.
      Returns:
      the possibly empty list of references to the given method.

    • getReferences

      List<ConstructorReference> getReferences(Constructor m)
      Returns the list of references to a given constructor. The references stem from all known compilation units.
      Parameters:
      m - a constructor.
      Returns:
      the possibly empty list of references to the given constructor.

    • getReferences

      List<VariableReference> getReferences(Variable v)
      Returns the list of references to a given variable. The references stem from all known compilation units.
      Parameters:
      v - a variable.
      Returns:
      the possibly empty list of references to the given variable.

    • getReferences

      List<FieldReference> getReferences(Field f)
      Returns the list of references to a given field. The references stem from all known compilation units.
      Parameters:
      f - a field.
      Returns:
      the possibly empty list of references to the given field.

    • getReferences

      List<TypeReference> getReferences(Type t)
      Returns the list of references to a given type. The references stem from all known compilation units.
      Parameters:
      t - a type.
      Returns:
      the possibly empty list of references to the given type.

    • getReferences

      List<PackageReference> getReferences(Package p)
      Returns the list of references to a given package. The references stem from all known compilation units.
      Parameters:
      p - a package.
      Returns:
      the possibly empty list of references to the given package.
